TITLE Ground Beef and Zucchini Skillet

# Prepare: peal and 1/2 inch cube [1 item sweet potato]. Dice [1 item red onion], [1 item zucchini], [1 item red pepper]. Mince [4 cloves garlic].

# In a large pan, saute sweet potato, stirring occasionally, for 4 to 5 minutes.
# Add remaining prepared veg and cook until the vegetables are slightly tender.
# Move the vegetables to one side of the skillet and place [1 lbs ground beef] on the other side.
# Cook the beef breaking it into small pieces as it cooks. 
# Drain any excess grease once the beef is cooked through.
# Reduce the heat to medium-low 
# Add [15 oz fire-roasted tomatoes], [1 cup [frozen] corn], [15 oz black beans[, drained and rinsed]], and [3 tbl taco seasoning]. 
# Sprinkle [1 cup [shredded] monterey jack] over the top, 
# Place the lid on the skillet, remove from the heat, and let the cheese melt.
# Serve with [cilantro] and [green onions].
